candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; same values as Net revenue and suitable as top-line revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; appears to be the underlying revenue line.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue label changes over time.

candidates.why: Direct cost line matching COGS exactly.
Overhead component; personnel costs are typical SG&A content.
Can be overhead, but this line is very small relative to other operating cost lines and may not capture the main SG&A bucket.

variables.notes: Candidate list appears incomplete for SG&A. 'Other external expenses' is present in the Income Statement and looks like a major operating overhead bucket that should be included with personnel and other operating expenses. Chosen outside candidate list because none of the provided candidates alone seem sufficient to represent SG&A. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other external expenses

candidates.why: Balance-sheet asset line, not an income-statement R&D expense.
Gross balance-sheet capitalized R&D cost, not period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset balance-sheet line, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No income-statement R&D expense line is provided. Balance-sheet R&D/development asset lines should not be used for XRD expense.

candidates.why: Closest reported finance-cost line available across years; broader than pure interest but acceptable when interest expense is not separately reported for all years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest-related, but supplemental and lease-specific only; less preferable than the main reported finance-cost line.

variables.notes: Provided candidates miss the more direct reported interest labels 'Interest charge lease liability' and 'Interest charges other' visible in the Income Statement. Using a priority list with the broader 'Financial expenses' first for coverage, followed by the more specific interest lines. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest charge lease liability, [Income Statement] Interest charges other

candidates.why: Equity total, but includes non-controlling interest and would double count if MIB is also captured separately.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred BE should exclude non-controlling interests. Candidate list does not include the clearly better owner-equity line 'Equity attributable to parent company shareholders', so selected from the sheet outside candidates. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to parent company shareholders

candidates.why: Income-statement allocation line, not the balance-sheet minority interest stock.
Direct balance-sheet minority interest line; plural variant also present with identical values.
Income-statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total

variables.notes: Priority list uses the balance-sheet NCI labels only; these avoid mixing in income-statement allocation lines.
